description: Progressive-enhancement guided tour. Renders as an in-page step list without JS; enhances to an interactive spotlight overlay with the web component.

attributes.name: data-title
attributes.description: Tour name for aria-label and heading

attributes.name: data-persist-key
attributes.description: Storage key override (defaults to page path)

attributes.name: data-spotlight-padding
attributes.description: Pixel padding around the spotlight rect

attributes.name: data-complete
attributes.description: Present after tour finishes or is skipped

structure.description: Individual tour step — contains heading and description

childAttributes.name: data-target
childAttributes.description: CSS selector for the element to highlight

childAttributes.name: data-placement
childAttributes.description: Preferred card placement relative to target

childAttributes.name: data-action
childAttributes.description: Required user action before Next is enabled

childAttributes.name: data-action-hint
childAttributes.description: Instructional text shown while waiting for action

childAttributes.name: data-skippable
childAttributes.description: Whether this step can be skipped

events.name: tour:action
events.description: Fired when a required action completes

events.name: tour:complete
events.description: Fired when last step is finished

events.name: tour:skip
events.description: Fired when user skips the tour
